channel.title: mbAInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from mbAInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Better Buy: Bitcoin vs. Ethereum

item.description: In a scheme that could surely kick off the plot of a movie, a former DJ who ran a fraudulent airplane engine parts scheme worth tens of millions of do...

item.title: Singaporeâs Singtel partners with Nvidia to build a research lab for companies that care about data sovereignty
item.description: Singtel is leaning into its AI and data center business as its mobile services business faces more competition.

item.title: Macy's has 'comfortable and stylish' Adidas sneakers on sale for only $35
item.description: "Bought these for my husband and heâs been wearing them every day since."

item.title: Scientists are pushing back on warnings that microplastics damage your health, saying people are just obese and calling some studies âa jokeâ

item.title: Walmart is selling an adjustable 5-shelf bookshelf with a cabinet for $82
item.description: "It is well-made, and the directions were simple to follow."

item.title: Sam Altman gets defensive about AIâs massive electricity usage: âIt also takes a lot of energy to train a humanâ
item.description: Altman said data centers have moved past water-intensive cooling, but 56% globally still use evaporative systems.

item.title: Amazon is selling a 13-piece organizer set for $7 that can help tame junk drawer chaos
item.description: "These work great and are the absolute perfect size for any desk."

item.description: CarMax allegedly violated federal law by repossessing servicemembers' vehicles without required court orders, leading to a $420,000 settlement agreeme...

item.title: Discord cuts ties with Peter Thiel-backed verification software after its code was found tied to U.S. surveillance efforts
item.description: Discord cut ties with its age-verification partner after exposed code fueled federal-reporting concerns, months after a breach hit 70,000 users.

item.title: Interface gives mixed Q4 result

item.description: According to a Bloomberg report, Hong Kong-based RedotPay is preparing a $1 billion U.S. IPO and could seek a valuation of up to $4 billion.
